primary_sources.title: Parti Keadilan Nasional ROS registration 4 April 1999; merger with PRM in 2003 to form PKR
Weiss, M. The Roots of Resilience (Cornell, 2020) — reformasi-era party formation

notes: Founded 4 April 1999 as Parti Keadilan Nasional, post-Anwar sacking; reorganised 2003 as PKR via merger with Parti Rakyat Malaysia. The principal multi-ethnic reformist party. Cohesion index reflects 2025 deputy-presidency contest (Nurul Izzah vs Rafizi 2:1) and the May 2026 Rafizi/Nik Nazmi resignations (T4A issue 1993). Lead party in Unity Govt (Anwar PM).
